This expands OT and ICS capabilities — but also their exposure to cyber threats. Unlike […]

items.title: Why we no longer evaluate SWE-bench Verified
items.summary: SWE-bench Verified is increasingly contaminated and mismeasures frontier coding progress. Our analysis shows flawed tests and training leakage. We recommend SWE-bench Pro.

items.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
items.summary: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production with secure, scalable agent deployments.

items.title: How speech models fail where it matters the most and what to do about it
items.summary: State-of-the-art speech models like Whisper and Deepgram score near-human on benchmarks — then fail 39% of the time on street names. New research from Together AI exposes the gap and a fix.

items.title: Our First Proof submissions
items.summary: We share our AI model’s proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge, testing research-grade reasoning on expert-level problems.
